name: opencode-mcp-agent
description: Use OpenCode as a managed MCP sub-agent runtime.

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check src/config.mjs && node --check src/constants.mjs && node --check src/handlers.mjs && node --check src/index.mjs && node --check src/messages.mjs && node --check src/process.mjs && node --check src/sidecar.mjs && node --check src/state.mjs && node --check src/tools.mjs && npm run test
